supporting_evidence: Hybrid States*: Tax incentives for joint methodological/doctrinal seminars (e.g., France’s Cassirer-Windelband synthesis). | Accounts for divergent institutional legacies (e.g., U.S. *methodological pragmatism* vs. Russia’s *doctrinal idealism*). |
Urban*: Hub for methodological innovation (e.g., Berlin’s *Reading Groups on Rickert*).

Rural*: Mobile pedagogical units for MR (e.g., mobile seminars on Windelband’s *history as science*). | Reflects access disparities (e.g., rural counties lack German-language archives but benefit from digital MR tools). |
